flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oakland Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Oakland Community College rose 28% between 2006 and 2009 (10.5% → 13.4%).
